reviews.comment:
Te hacen esperar 10 minutos para abrirte la puertita del local de repuestos. Pedís la lamparita más común del planeta (luz de giro 12V 21W color naranja) y te dicen que no tienen. Para eso mejor cierren muchachos...

(Translated by Google)
They make you wait 10 minutes to open the little door to the parts shop. You ask for the most common light bulb on the planet (12V 21W orange turn signal) and they tell you they don't have it. They might as well just close down, guys...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyXzZ1VGRREAE

reviews.comment:
Fatal experiencia. Cada vez que voy es algo nuevo. Te atienden lento, siempre están boludeando. Los días que la app tiene descuento te vienen con el cuento que no funciona.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience. Every time I go, it's something new. The service is slow, and they're always messing around. On days when the app has a discount, they tell you it's not working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyN2JUN2pnRRAB
